## Pruebas / Testing

     If device-specific, say which handheld you tested on. -->

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` y `pnpm build` pasan / pass
- [ ] `python -m pytest` pasa / passes
- [ ] Commits con formato convencional / Conventional commit messages
